name: Shrimp Chicken and Bacon
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs Boneless skinless chicken breasts, 1-inch strips
3 sprigs Fresh tarragon leaves (or 1 tbsp dried)
5 cups Fish stock or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
------------
1. Set a large heavy pan or Dutch oven on the stove over low heat and cook bacon. Stirring, for 2 minutes without browning.
2. Add white wine and increase heat to high. Bring liquid to boil and cook for 1 minute to burn off alcohol.
3. Add chicken, shrimp, stock, garlic, onion, celery seeds, and anise. Reduce heat to medium. If using dried tarragon, add it now.
4. Cover and cook for 3 minutes.
5. Add broccoli and milk; cook uncovered another 2 minutes.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. To serve, use a slotted spoon to transfer bacon, shrimp, chicken to soup bowls. Return broth to boil and add butter. Turn off heat. If using fresh tarragon leaves, add them just before serving. Makes six servings.
